title: ExtensionDefinition
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter portion of an AIP-40 EXTENSION.md manifest. An extension declares a workspace-local doctype that inherits a public AIP's schema and may add fields, tighten constraints, set defaults, and override the path convention.

schema.description: Pins the spec version this manifest conforms to.

slug.description: Namespaced identifier — `<namespace>:<name>`. Lowercase, digits, dashes; single colon separator. Example: `acme:deal`.

description.description: One-paragraph statement of the extension's purpose.

version.description: Extension's own semver. Bump on breaking change.

status.description: Extensions are perpetually Local — they never enter the public registry's Draft/Review/Final lifecycle.

extends.description: Parent AIP this extension inherits from, or `none` for a root doctype.

properties.description: JSON Schema property definitions to merge into the parent's properties. Collisions are an error — use `tighten` to narrow an existing field.

required.description: Field names that become required in addition to parent's required[]. Unioned with parent's required, never replaces.

add_fields.description: Schema-level additions: new properties + new required entries.

tighten.description: Per-field constraint overrides. Each entry MUST tighten (not loosen) the parent's constraints; runtimes verify monotonicity at registration.

defaults.description: Default values applied when a field is omitted. Layered on top of parent's defaults; extension's value wins on the same key.

path_convention.description: Filesystem convention template, e.g. `"deals/<slug>/DEAL.md"`. Tokens: `<slug>` (doctype identity), `<DOCTYPE>` (extension's slug name part). Falls back to parent's convention when omitted.

requires.description: Public AIPs the extension depends on, in addition to its parent.

metadata.description: Free-form vendor extensions under namespaced keys (`metadata.<vendor>.<field>`).
